zh.lifeSummary: 當Gwrwared ap Gwilym of Camaes於1165年出生在英國威爾斯安格萊時，他的父親Prince Gwilym Ap Gwrwared26歲，母親Annes verch Seisyll of Coed Rhath22歲。他於大約1240年與Gwenllian verch Ednyfed Fychan在英國威爾斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1260年在他的家鄉享年95歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gwrwared ap Gwilym of Camaes于1165年出生在英国威尔斯安格萊时，他的父亲Prince Gwilym Ap Gwrwared26岁，母亲Annes verch Seisyll of Coed Rhath22岁。他于大约1240年与Gwenllian verch Ednyfed Fychan在英国威尔斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1260年在他的家乡享年95岁。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

nameMeanings.name: Gwilym
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of William , in use since the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Gwilim
meanings: equivalent of William , in use since the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Gwillym
meanings: equivalent of William , in use since the Middle Ages.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Camaes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Spanish: habitational name from a place called Camas (Seville), of pre-Roman origin.

en.lifeSummary: When Gwrwared ap Gwilym of Camaes was born in 1165, in Anglesey, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Prince Gwilym Ap Gwrwared, was 26 and his mother, Annes verch Seisyll of Coed Rhath, was 22. He married Gwenllian verch Ednyfed Fychan about 1240, in Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1260, in his hometown, at the age of 95.

fr.Holyhead, Wales: Holyhead, Gwynedd, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gwrwared ap Gwilym of Camaes est né en 1165, à Anglesey, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Prince Gwilym Ap Gwrwared, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Annes verch Seisyll of Coed Rhath, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Gwenllian verch Ednyfed Fychan environ 1240, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1260, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 95 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gwrwared ap Gwilym of Camaes 1165 in Anglesey, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Prince Gwilym Ap Gwrwared 26 und seine Mutter Annes verch Seisyll of Coed Rhath 22. Er hat um 1240 in Wales, United Kingdom Gwenllian verch Ednyfed Fychan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1260 im Alter von 95 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gwrwared ap Gwilym of Camaes è nato il nel 1165 nel Anglesey, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Prince Gwilym Ap Gwrwared, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Annes verch Seisyll of Coed Rhath, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Gwenllian verch Ednyfed Fychan circa 1240, nel Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1260, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 95 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gwrwared ap Gwilym of Camaesが1165年にイギリスウェールズアングレセイで生まれた時，父Prince Gwilym Ap Gwrwaredは26歳，母Annes verch Seisyll of Coed Rhathは22歳であった。約1240年にイギリスウェールズでGwenllian verch Ednyfed Fychanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1260年に故郷で95歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gwrwared ap Gwilym of Camaes(이)가 1165년 영국 웨일스 앤글레시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Prince Gwilym Ap Gwrwared(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Annes verch Seisyll of Coed Rhath(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1240년 영국 웨일스에서 Gwenllian verch Ednyfed Fychan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1260년 그의 고향에서 95세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gwrwared ap Gwilym of Camaes nasceu em 1165, em Anglesey, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Prince Gwilym Ap Gwrwared, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Annes verch Seisyll of Coed Rhath, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Gwenllian verch Ednyfed Fychan aproximadamente 1240, em Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1260, em sua cidade natal, com 95 anos.

ro.Holyhead, Wales: Holyhead, Gwynedd, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gwrwared ap Gwilym of Camaes родился в 1165 г. в местности англеси, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Prince Gwilym Ap Gwrwared было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Annes verch Seisyll of Coed Rhath, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Gwenllian verch Ednyfed Fychan около 1240 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1260 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 95 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gwrwared ap Gwilym of Camaes nació en 1165, en Isla Oscura, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Prince Gwilym Ap Gwrwared, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Annes verch Seisyll of Coed Rhath, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Gwenllian verch Ednyfed Fychan aproximadamente 1240, en Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1260, en su pueblo, a la edad de 95 años.
